tasks.name: Environment Setup
tasks.description: Verify SAELens, TransformerLens, PyTorch, and dependencies are installed. Verify GPU availability and model loading for GPT-2 Small SAE.
tasks.expected_output: Environment ready, dependencies installed, GPU verified, SAE loads successfully

pilot.pass_criteria: All packages import successfully; GPU detected; GPT-2 Small SAE loads without error

tasks.name: Construct Local Inhibition Graph (GPT-2 Small, all layers)
tasks.description: For GPT-2 Small res-jb SAE (24K latents), construct local inhibition graph at layers 0, 4, 8, 10. Compute decoder correlation matrix G = W_dec^T W_dec. For each latent, keep top-k=20,50,100 neighbors. Save graph edges and weights.
tasks.expected_output: inhibition_graph_gpt2_l{0,4,8,10}_k{20,50,100}.json with edges and weights per latent

pilot.pass_criteria: Graph construction completes for all 4 layers; mean edge weight computable; top-k neighbors extracted without error

visualizations.description: Mean edge weight and graph density across layers

tasks.name: H6: Validate Graph Edges Predict Absorption Pairs
tasks.description: Use existing Chanin absorption detection results as ground truth. For each absorption pair (parent i, absorbing j), check if j is in N(i) for k=20,50,100. Compute precision@k, recall@k, AUPR. Compare against random baseline (shuffled latent indices). Fisher exact test for enrichment.
tasks.expected_output: h6_graph_validation.json with precision@k, recall@k, AUPR, Fisher test p-values per layer

pilot.pass_criteria: Precision@20 >= 0.10 (vs ~0.004 chance) for at least one layer; Fisher test p < 0.001

visualizations.description: Precision-recall curves at different k values
H6 validation results: precision@k, recall@k, Fisher test per layer

tasks.name: H7: Test Inhibition Explains Precision-Recall Asymmetry
tasks.description: For each first-letter feature at layers 4 and 8, compute total incoming inhibition from graph. Test correlation: total_inhibition vs. recall (predicted: r < -0.3) and total_inhibition vs. precision (predicted: |r| < 0.1). Use existing probing precision/recall data.
tasks.expected_output: h7_precision_recall_asymmetry.json with correlations, p-values, scatter data

pilot.pass_criteria: Recall correlates negatively with inhibition (r < -0.2); precision shows no significant correlation (|r| < 0.2, p > 0.05)

visualizations.description: Total incoming inhibition vs. recall (predicted negative correlation)
Total incoming inhibition vs. precision (predicted no correlation)

tasks.name: H8: Test Graph Predicts At-Risk Features
tasks.description: For each first-letter feature, compute graph statistics: total_inhibition, degree, centrality, clustering coefficient. Test correlation with absorption_rate. Compare top vs. bottom quartile. Test whether graph stats alone can predict absorption rate.
tasks.expected_output: h8_at_risk_prediction.json with correlations, quartile comparison, prediction accuracy

pilot.pass_criteria: r(total_inhibition, absorption_rate) > 0.2; top quartile has >1.5x absorption rate vs. bottom quartile

visualizations.description: Total incoming inhibition vs. absorption rate

tasks.name: H9: Layer-Dependent Graph Structure Analysis
tasks.description: Compute graph statistics (mean edge weight, density, clustering coefficient) for layers 0, 4, 8, 10. Test correlation with layer depth. Compare layer 8 (where prior H1b was significant) vs. other layers.
tasks.expected_output: h9_layer_structure.json with graph stats per layer and correlation tests

pilot.pass_criteria: Mean edge weight shows monotonic increase with layer depth; layer 8 has highest or second-highest mean edge weight

visualizations.description: Graph statistics by layer: mean edge weight, density, clustering

tasks.name: H10: Homeostatic Rebalancing Experiment
tasks.description: For test prompts containing first-letter words, compute original SAE latents. Apply homeostatic rebalancing: z'_i = z_i + alpha * sum_{j in N(i)} G_ij * z_j. Sweep alpha in [0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0]. Measure parent firing rate before/after and reconstruction error. Constrain error increase < 5%.
tasks.expected_output: h10_homeostatic_rebalance.json with parent firing rates and reconstruction errors per alpha

pilot.pass_criteria: Parent firing rate increases by >10% for at least one alpha; reconstruction error increase < 10% for that alpha

tasks.name: Publication-Ready Visualizations
tasks.description: Generate all publication-ready figures and tables for the paper. Includes architecture diagram, precision-recall curves, correlation plots, layer comparison, rebalancing curves, and summary tables.
tasks.expected_output: figures/ and tables/ directories with publication-ready artifacts

pilot.pass_criteria: All expected visualizations generated; summary table complete

visualizations.description: Main results: precision@k across layers and k values

tasks.name: Optional: Cross-Model Validation (Gemma-2-2B)
tasks.description: Replicate H6 (graph validation) on Gemma-2-2B GemmaScope SAE (16K latents, layer 8). Construct inhibition graph, detect absorption on first-letter features, compute precision@k. Test whether findings generalize.

pilot.pass_criteria: Graph construction completes; precision@20 >= 0.05 (lower bar than primary due to smaller dict)

visualizations.description: Cross-model comparison: GPT-2 vs Gemma precision@k

tasks.name: Final Synthesis and Paper Preparation
tasks.description: Aggregate all results, generate summary statistics, and prepare data for paper writing. Produce final hypothesis testing summary with all evidence. Apply pivot decision tree.
tasks.expected_output: final_synthesis.json with complete hypothesis results and paper-ready summary

pilot.pass_criteria: All hypotheses have clear verdicts with supporting evidence; pivot decision applied

visualizations.description: Final hypothesis summary with pivot decision

pilot_summary.pilot_go_criteria: H6 shows precision@20 >= 0.10 with Fisher p < 0.001 for at least one layer

pivot_conditions.proceed_full: H6 validated (precision@20 >= 0.10) -> proceed with all H6-H10 + optional cross-model
pivot_conditions.diagnostic_only: H6 partially validated (precision@20 = 0.05-0.10) -> proceed with diagnostic claims only, drop H10 repair
pivot_conditions.pivot_to_tradeoff: H6 not validated (precision@20 <= 0.05) -> pivot to cand_c (trade-off analysis)
pivot_conditions.strengthen_with_repair: H6 validated AND H10 succeeds (recon error < 5%, parent firing +20%) -> add repair as secondary contribution
